data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-03-13)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.67T, up by 0.52% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $80,608 and $84,540 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $83,242, up by 1.18%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include ELF, TROY, and RED, up by 36%, 34%, and 26%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Crypto News: Bitcoin Faces US Selling Pressure as CPI Inflation Declines for First Time Since Mid-2024

Crypto News Today: Franklin Templeton Files Solana ETF Application via Cboe BZX, Pushes for Staking Approval

Crypto News: SEC Delays Decision on Fidelity Ether ETF Options, Sets New May 14 Deadline

Bitcoin News: Bitcoin Price Recovery Faces Headwinds as U.S. Treasury Volatility Surges to 4-Month High

BNB’s Hidden Potential: Why It’s More Than Just Binance’s Token

Crypto Today: Bitcoin Miner Bitdeer Boosts BTC Holdings by 75% Amid Market Volatility

Crypto News Today: Why Is XRP Price Up Today? ETF Filing and Legal Resolution Fuel Rally

Crypto News: MGX Invests $2 Billion in Binance, Marking Historic Crypto Deal

Crypto News: U.S. CPI Rises Less Than Expected, Bitcoin Surges Past $84K on Rate Cut Hopes

Crypto News: Franklin Templeton Files for XRP Spot ETF Amid Growing Institutional Interest

Crypto CPI Watch: Bitcoin RSI Bullish Divergence Signals Potential Recovery Ahead of U.S. CPI Release

Bitcoin News Today: Bitcoin Futures Spread Contracts to $490, Erasing ‘Trump Bump’ Amid Macro Pressures

Crypto CPI Watch: Bitcoin Holds $80K Amid Risk-Off Sentiment as CPI Data Looms

Bitcoin News: Bitcoin’s Four-Year CAGR Hits Record Low, Ethereum-to-BTC Ratio Plunges to 2020 Levels

data.title: Crypto.com to offer crypto services to 4 million UAE Tawasal Superapp users
data.description:
As more UAE entities team up with crypto exchanges and blockchain providers to offer crypto services. A UAE AI Blockchain and tech firm, Tawasal Al Khaleej, will work with Crypto.com, a global crypto exchange regulated in the UAE, in a two-stage deal to offer its 4 million Tawasal Super messenger application crypto services. As per […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-com-partners-with-tawasal-superapp/

data.title: Brevan Howard Reduces Risk Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
According to PANews, Brevan Howard Asset Management, a prominent U.S. macro hedge fund, is significantly reducing the risk exposure of its traders following a decline in performance and the evaporation of last year's gains. Informed sources indicate that CEO Aron Landy has implemented defensive measures in response to increased market volatility and turmoil, including lowering risk limits for some traders. An investor letter reveals that Brevan Howard's flagship Master Fund fell by 1% in the first week of March, extending its year-to-date loss to 5.4%, compared to a 5.1% gain last year. Another major fund, Alpha Strategies, declined by 0.8% during the same period but has risen 1.5% this year. Since its inception in 2003, the flagship fund has only experienced an annual loss exceeding 5% once.

In recent weeks, global market volatility has intensified amid conflicts between U.S. President Donald Trump's administration and global trade partners, raising investor concerns over issues ranging from tariffs on Canadian goods to increased defense spending in Europe. This turbulence has also affected other hedge fund giants such as Citadel, Millennium Management, and DE Shaw & Co.

data.title: Ripple’s becomes first blockchain to acquire Dubai regulatory approval for cross-border payment
data.description:
Ripple has achieved a significant regulatory milestone by securing a license from the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA), making it the first blockchain payment provider to receive such approval. The announcement on March 13 follows an initial in-principle clearance, paving the way for the company to expand its services in the region. Reece Merrick, Ripple’s Managing […]
The post...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ripples-becomes-first-blockchain-to-acquire-dubai-regulatory-approval-for-cross-border-payment/

data.title: Deribit: About $3.27 billion in crypto options will expire this Friday, and BTC's biggest pain point is $86,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Deribit data, about $3.27 billion of crypto options will expire at 08:00 UTC this Friday (March 15), with Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) dominating.
BTC option open interest notional value: $2.87 billion | Maximum pain point: $86,000 | Put/call ratio: 0.74
ETH option open interest notional value: $399 million | Maximum pain point: $2,150 | Put/call ratio: 0.71
Deribit pointed out that the market's maximum pain point (Max Pain) has been moving down for several consecutive weeks.

data.title: Zhu Su Highlights Challenges Facing Ethereum Amid CeDeFi Rise
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 13, Zhu Su, the founder of Three Arrows Capital, expressed concerns on social media regarding the impact of CeDeFi on Ethereum. He stated that the rise of CeDeFi represents a significant challenge for Ethereum, as many open smart contracts, initially envisioned to operate on distributed networks, are now being executed on single servers with closed-source code. Zhu Su emphasized the need for Ethereum to embrace applications that require global distributed computing and censorship resistance, particularly those with cryptographic attributes like privacy protection. He warned that if Ethereum's performance remains subpar, the revival of DeFi will be difficult to achieve. In a world where validator decentralization and smart contract demand are low, off-chain solutions may become mainstream due to their cost and efficiency advantages.

data.title: The Ethermine-related wallet, which has been silent for 3 years, withdrew 2,692 ETH from OKX, about 5.01 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Spot On Chain, an on-chain analyst, an Ethermine-related wallet created 7 years ago became active again after 3 years of silence, withdrawing 2,692 ETH from OKX, about 5.01 million US dollars.
The wallet had been partially dormant for a long time, and it is unclear where its subsequent funds flowed.

data.title: Europeans show little interest in digital euro, ECB study reveals
data.description:
European consumers have shown minimal interest in adopting a central bank digital currency (CBDC), raising concerns for the European Central Bank (ECB) as it prepares for a potential rollout of the digital euro.An ECB working paper on “Consumer attitudes towards a central bank digital currency,” which surveyed about 19,000 respondents across 11 euro-area countries, highlighted significant...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/europeans-reject-digital-euro-ecb-survey?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: FTX/Alameda redeems 185k SOL today, totaling 7.845m SOL ($1.00878 B) since Nov 2023
data.description:
Arkham Intelligence has revealed that FTX/Alameda redeemed 185,328 SOL from staking a few hours ago. The now defunct company also distributed approximately $22.89 million in digital assets to 38 addresses.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ftx-alameda-redeems-185k-sol/

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT, and DOGE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume. BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.84, funding rate: 0.0024%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 4.82 , funding rate: -0.0009%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.07, funding rate: -0.0062%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.58, funding rate: -0.0019%.DOGE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.12, funding rate: 0.0008%.
